title: Bound worker concurrency and queue depth
description: Workers process with an explicit concurrency limit and bounded queue so load sheds rather than exhausting resources.
body: Use when building a consumer or a fan-out that pulls work as fast as it arrives. Do not spawn an unbounded goroutine/promise per message or hold an unbounded in-memory buffer. Actions: set an explicit max concurrency tied to the downstream pool (DB connections, API rate limit); apply backpressure by pausing fetch when in-flight reaches the limit; reject or shed when the bound is exceeded. Validation signals include a load test showing in-flight work plateaus at the limit and memory stays flat. Risk boundary: unbounded concurrency that exhausts a shared connection pool degrades unrelated services and warrants escalation.
